problem.title: Accounts Receivables is harder than it should be
problem.description: Managing the journey from invoice to payment means navigating complexity every day. Different customers, different rules, different expectations. Traditional tools weren't built for this.

fragmentedSystems.title: Fragmented systems
fragmentedSystems.description: Order-to-Cash lives across multiple tools. Data is scattered, context is lost, and no one has the full picture.

everyCustomer.title: Every customer is different
everyCustomer.description: Payment terms, credit limits, communication preferences—one approach never fits all. But manual customization doesn't scale.

manualWork.title: Manual work dominates
manualWork.description: Teams spend hours chasing updates, sending reminders, and updating spreadsheets instead of solving real problems.

lackVisibility.title: Lack of visibility
lackVisibility.description: Without a clear view of what's happening—and what's coming—teams are always reacting instead of planning.

solution.title: A connecting layer for your entire process
solution.description: ARMS doesn't replace what you have—it brings it all together. Real-time visibility, intelligent guidance, and coordinated action across every customer and every team.

seeEverything.title: See everything
seeEverything.description: Real-time visibility across all customers, all stages, all teams—in one unified view.

connectDots.title: Connect the dots
connectDots.description: Link events, actions, and outcomes. Understand cause and effect across your portfolio.

knowNext.title: Know what's next
knowNext.description: Clear guidance on priorities and next steps—so your team always knows where to focus.

customization.title: Customization

jobPages.howWeWorkBody: We value ownership, autonomy, and collaboration. You'll have the freedom to make decisions and the responsibility that comes with it. We focus on solving real-world problems for real users—no busywork, no theater.

fullStack.about: We're looking for a Full Stack Developer to help build and scale the tools that power our Order-to-Cash platform. You'll work across the entire stack—from crafting intuitive interfaces to designing robust systems. This is a hands-on role where you'll have real ownership over features that finance teams rely on every day.
whatYoullDo: Build and maintain features across our frontend and backend
Design and implement APIs that handle complex financial workflows
Collaborate with product and operations teams to understand real user needs
Improve system reliability, performance, and developer experience
Participate in code reviews and help maintain high code quality standards
whatWeLookFor: 3+ years of experience building web applications
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and React
Experience with relational databases and API design
Comfort working in a fast-moving, ownership-driven environment
Clear communication and a collaborative mindset

arSpecialist.about: We're looking for an Accounts Receivable Specialist to join our operations team and manage AR workflows for global clients. You'll be the expert who ensures invoices get paid, disputes are resolved, and cash flow stays healthy. Using ARMS as your primary tool, you'll bring structure and efficiency to complex customer accounts.
whatYoullDo: Manage end-to-end accounts receivable processes for assigned client portfolios
Monitor aging reports and prioritize collection activities
Resolve billing disputes and discrepancies with customers
Maintain accurate records and documentation in ARMS
Collaborate with client finance teams to improve payment processes
whatWeLookFor: 2+ years of experience in accounts receivable or credit & collections
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Excellent communication skills in English and Spanish
Comfort with technology and learning new systems quickly

industries.title: Order-to-Cash Built for
industries.agnosticMessage: ARMS is industry-agnostic and works across all geographies. These industries represent where we have the deepest experience.
industries.averageDSOTooltip: How many days on average it takes for you to get paid
industries.armsDSOTooltip: Your improved payment timeline with ARMS
industries.exploreHow: Explore How ARMS Fits Your Industry

anyIndustry.title: Any Industry with an AR Problem
anyIndustry.badge: 30% average DSO reduction across all industries
anyIndustry.closingText: Don't see your industry? ARMS works wherever invoices do.

challenges.transport1: Over 60% of payment delays are caused by missing or incorrect Bill of Lading or Proof of Delivery
challenges.transport2: High invoice volumes with frequent disputes tied to shortages, damages, or accessorial charges
challenges.transport3: Multi-party billing creates fragmented ownership of payment follow-up
challenges.pharma1: Chargebacks can represent up to 10% of gross revenue and require manual validation
challenges.pharma2: Payments depend on contract pricing accuracy and multi-step approvals
challenges.pharma3: Small pricing or compliance errors often delay payment by weeks
challenges.industrial1: Payments tied to delivery acceptance or project milestones
challenges.industrial2: Distributor networks reduce visibility into who controls payment
challenges.industrial3: Over 10% of receivables are typically overdue beyond 90 days
challenges.consumer1: More than 50% of B2B invoices are paid late at least once
challenges.consumer2: Retail deductions and chargebacks require constant manual handling
challenges.consumer3: High invoice volumes make prioritization difficult
challenges.professional1: Scope creep causes invoice disputes in over 40% of consulting engagements, freezing payment approvals
challenges.professional2: Multi-level client approval chains delay payments 15–20 days beyond agreed terms on average
challenges.professional3: Relationship-driven culture discourages enforcement, leaving 30% of overdue invoices unchallenged past 60 days

hero.headline: We didn't build ARMS in a boardroom. We built it in the trenches.
hero.subheadline: Starting as an outsourced AR team in 2021, we experienced the chaos of collections firsthand. So we built the platform we wished we had.

origin.title: From service provider to platform
origin.subtitle: Our journey started with a simple realization: the tools didn't match the problem.

2021.headline: The problem beneath the surface
2021.description: ARMS was founded with deep knowledge in logistics. We saw how complex and manual accounts receivable truly was—every customer following different paths with different rules.

2022.headline: Building the team
2022.description: We built an outsourced accounts receivable team to manage this complexity. To make the work more efficient, we started creating internal tools.

2023.headline: Software that actually works
2023.description: That internal software became ARMS. It worked so well for our team that we decided to launch it as a platform for companies across industries.

2026.headline: Practitioners building for practitioners
2026.description: ARMS now serves companies worldwide. Our team combines deep AR expertise with cutting-edge technology. We've lived the problem we're solving.

theReality.title: The Reality
theReality.text: ARMS was founded with deep knowledge in the logistics industry, where we saw how complex and manual accounts receivable truly was.

theProblem.title: The Problem Beneath the Surface
theProblem.text: Every container, invoice, and customer followed a different path, with different rules and expectations. What seemed like a billing issue was actually a broken Order-to-Cash process.

theResponse.title: The Human Response
theResponse.text: We built an outsourced accounts receivable team to manage this complexity. To make the work more efficient, the team created internal software.

thePlatform.title: The Platform Emerges
thePlatform.text: That software became ARMS. This became so successful for us that we decided to launch as a platform for companies across industries and regions.

workWith.title: One platform. Two ways to work.
workWith.subtitle: Always focused on clarity and results.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy document establishes the terms under which ARMS Tech uses and protects the information provided by its users when using its website and/or the ARMS Tech application.

infoCollected.title: Information Collected
infoCollected.content: Our website and/or the ARMS Tech platform may collect personal information such as name, contact information like email address, and/or demographic information. Likewise, when necessary, specific information may be required to process an order or carry out delivery or billing.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content1: A cookie refers to a file that is sent in order to request permission to be stored on your computer. By accepting this file, it is created, and the cookie then serves to store information regarding web traffic and also facilitates future visits to a recurring website. Another function of cookies is that they allow websites to recognize you individually and therefore provide you with the best personalized service.
cookies.content2: Our website uses cookies to identify which pages are visited and how often. This information is used solely for statistical analysis and is then permanently deleted. You can delete cookies at any time from your computer. However, cookies help provide better service from websites. They do not give access to information on your computer or about you unless you choose to provide it directly. You can accept or decline the use of cookies. However, most browsers automatically accept cookies since they help provide better web service. You can also change your computer settings to decline cookies. If you decline them, you may not be able to use some of our services.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Links
thirdParty.content: This website may contain links to other sites that may be of interest to you. Once you click on these links and leave our page, we no longer have control over the site to which you are redirected and therefore are not responsible for the terms, privacy practices, or protection of your data on those third-party sites. Such sites are subject to their own privacy policies, so it is recommended that you review them to confirm that you agree with them.

control.title: Control of Your Personal Information
control.content1: At any time, you may restrict the collection or use of personal information provided on our website. Each time you are asked to fill out a form, such as a user registration form, you can check or uncheck the option to receive information by email. If you have chosen to receive our newsletter or advertising, you may cancel it at any time. This company will not sell, assign, or distribute the personal information collected without your consent, unless required by a judge through a court order.
control.content2: ARMS Tech is committed to the security of its users' data. When we ask you to fill in personal information fields by which you can be identified, we do so ensuring that it will only be used in accordance with the terms of this document. However, ARMS Tech reserves the right to change the terms of this Privacy Policy at any time.

paths.title: Find Your Path
paths.subtitle: Three ways to partner with us. All of them worthwhile.

registered.name: Registered Partner
registered.description: You know businesses that struggle with collections. Connect them with ARMS and earn every time you do. No complex certifications, no pressure — just a straightforward way to add value to your network.
whatYouGet: Standard commission on every closed deal
Access to sales and pitch materials
Opportunity registration to protect your leads

certified.name: Certified Partner
certified.tagline: Go deeper. Build a real practice.
certified.description: You're ready to do more than refer — you want to sell, implement, and support ARMS as part of your core offering. This is where serious channel partners operate and where the biggest opportunities are.
whatYouDo: Run the full sales cycle end to end

strategic.name: Strategic Partner
strategic.description: You have the scale, the market presence, and the ambition to grow with ARMS long term. Strategic partners don't just sell our product — they help shape where it goes. If that sounds like you, let's talk.
whatYouGet: Early access to new features and betas

progression.title: Your Growth Path
progression.subtitle: See exactly what changes as you grow with us.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before taking the next step.

items.q: Do I need experience in accounts receivable to become a partner?
items.a: Not at all. Many of our most successful Registered Partners came from adjacent fields like finance, ERP consulting, or business advisory. We provide everything you need to understand and communicate the value of ARMS to your clients. If you know businesses that struggle with collections, you're already halfway there.

items.q: How quickly can I start earning?
items.a: As a Registered Partner you can start referring opportunities immediately after completing a short onboarding. Most partners make their first referral within the first two weeks. Certified Partners typically close their first deal within 60 days of certification.

items.q: What's the time commitment for each partner level?
items.a: Registered Partners can participate at their own pace — there's no minimum activity requirement to get started. Certified Partners commit to minimum sales targets and maintaining trained personnel. Strategic Partners operate under a joint growth plan with ARMS, which involves a deeper, ongoing commitment.

items.q: How does the commission structure work?
items.a: Each partner level has its own commission tier, with higher levels earning a greater percentage per closed deal. Specific commission rates are shared during the onboarding conversation with our partnerships team. We keep it transparent and competitive.

items.q: Can I upgrade my partner level over time?
items.a: Absolutely — and we actively encourage it. Every level is designed with clear incentives to move up. When you're ready to go deeper, our team will guide you through the transition. There's no penalty for starting at Registered and growing from there.

items.q: What support does ARMS provide to partners?
items.a: It depends on your level. Registered Partners get access to sales materials and commercial support. Certified Partners unlock priority support and co-marketing. Strategic Partners get a dedicated partner success manager and early access to new features. At every level, you're not on your own.

items.q: What if my market isn't listed yet?
items.a: That's actually one of our favorite conversations to have. ARMS is actively growing and every new market we enter starts with a partner who believed in it early. If you're based somewhere we're not yet, reach out anyway — we want to hear from you. Spain, Colombia, and Argentina are already on our roadmap, and beyond that, we're open. The right partner in the right market can change everything.
